objective: Run a simple NanoHorizon Craftax baseline with OpenRouter model x-ai/grok-4.1-fast for the local Open Research demo path, spend the configured LLM calls, and report the concrete mean outcome reward.

required_inputs.name: output_root
required_inputs.default_behavior: timestamped local run directory under runs/nanohorizon_craftax_hello_world/, or the current workspace root for live SMR execution

output_contract.primary_success_signal: the bundle includes concrete rollout evidence for the requested Craftax trajectories and records the observed mean_outcome_reward
